text: NOW: Viktor Orbán: The election result, although not yet complete, is understandable and clear. The responsibility and opportunity of governance were not given to us. I congratulated the winning party.
text_zh: 现在：维克托·欧尔班：选举结果虽然尚未完全统计，但已清晰可辨。治理国家的责任和机会并没有交给我们。我已经向获胜方表示了祝贺。

text: From the vicinity of Sheikh Ragheb Harb Hospital in Toul
text_zh: 位于图尔的谢赫·拉格布·哈尔布医院附近

text: 🇭🇺 Peter Magyar says Orbán congratulated him on his victory. The Tisza Party has also secured a supermajority in parliament. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Liveuamap Options for Orban: a) become Yanukovych neighbour, b) become Assad neighbour https://x.com/Liveuamap/status/2043405391980036184 First results of the Hungarian parliamentary elections are in: with 14.72% counted, the opposition leads with mandates nearing a two-thirds majority. Everything points to Viktor Orbán’s defeat and Péter Magyar becoming Hungary’s next prime minister https://hungary.liveuamap.com/en/2026/12-april-18-first-results-of-the-hungarian-parliamentary - Liveuamap tweet
text_zh: Liveuamap 欧尔班的选择：a) 成为亚努科维奇的邻居，b) 成为阿萨德的邻居 https://x.com/Liveuamap/status/2043405391980036184 匈牙利议会选举初步结果出炉：在已统计 14.72% 的选票中，反对派领先，席位接近三分之二多数。一切迹象表明维克托·欧尔班已败选，彼得·马扎尔将成为匈牙利下一任总理 https://hungary.liveuamap.com/en/2026/12-april-18-first-results-of-the-hungarian-parliamentary - Liveuamap 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hungary's Tisza party projected to win a two-thirds majority in parliament with 135 of 199 seats, based on partial results from the national election office. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043407463433613428/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 匈牙利蒂萨党根据国家选举办公室的初步结果，预计将在议会 199 个席位中赢得 135 席，获得三分之二多数。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043407463433613428/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated With 45.71 percent counted, Tisza has 135 seats and Orban’s party 57. A constitutional majority requires 133 seats. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043406999262470521/photo/1 Polling stations in Hungary are now closed. Turnout hit 77.8 percent by 18:30 local or 5.856 million voters, the National Election Commission says, and the final figure will be close to 80 percent. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043378034569289919/photo/1 - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 随着 45.71% 的选票统计完成，蒂萨党获得 135 个席位，欧尔班的政党获得 57 个席位。宪法多数需要 133 个席位。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043406999262470521/photo/1 匈牙利投票站现已关闭。国家选举委员会称，截至当地时间 18:30，投票率达到 77.8%，即 585.6 万选民，最终数字将接近 80%。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043378034569289919/photo/1 - WarTranslated 推文

text: Open Source Intel Bill Maher: “There is such a thing as Western civilization. I remember after nine eleven, if you said clash of civilizations, it was the beginning of sort of that wokeness where, oh, you don't say that. That's Islamophobia. No. It was a clash of civilizations. The civilizations are very different, and ours is better. Right. It is. And if you're not clapping, spend a week in a Muslim capital. You wouldn't last.” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 比尔·马赫：“确实存在西方文明这一说法。我记得在 9/11 事件之后，如果你说文明冲突，那就像是那种‘觉醒文化’的开始，哦，你不能那样说。那是伊斯兰恐惧症。不。那确实是文明的冲突。这些文明非常不同，而我们的文明更好。没错。确实如此。如果你不鼓掌，去穆斯林国家的首都待上一周吧。你待不下去的。” 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺TISZA has won 135 seats in the Hungarian parliament, winning them a supermajority. 45% of the votes have been counted so far. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Leader of Hungary's TISZA party Peter Magyar reports that Hungarian Prime Minister Orban called him to congratulated him. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺蒂萨党已在匈牙利议会赢得 135 个席位，获得了绝对多数。目前已统计 45% 的选票。@wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 匈牙利蒂萨党领导人彼得·马扎尔报告称，匈牙利总理欧尔班致电向他表示祝贺。@wfwitness

text: Commander of the Iranian Navy: Trump’s threats to impose a naval blockade on Iran are "ridiculous."
text_zh: 伊朗海军司令：特朗普对伊朗实施海上封锁的威胁是“荒谬的”。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iran's President Masoud Pezeshkian: If the American government abandons its totalitarianism and respects the rights of the Iranian nation, ways to reach an agreement will certainly be found.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗总统马苏德·佩泽希齐扬：如果美国政府放弃其极权主义并尊重伊朗民族的权利，达成协议的途径肯定会找到。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iranian Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf: If the United States wants to find a way out, the only path is to decide to earn the trust of the Iranian people. You are indebted to the Iranian nation and still have much to do to make amends. If you choose war, we will fight; if you come with logic, we will respond with logic. We will not submit to any threats. If they test our will again, we will give them a greater lesson.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫：如果美国想找到出路，唯一的途径就是决定赢得伊朗人民的信任。你们欠伊朗民族的，还有很多事情要做来弥补。如果你们选择战争，我们将战斗；如果你们讲逻辑，我们将以逻辑回应。我们不会屈服于任何威胁。如果他们再次考验我们的意志，我们将给他们一个更大的教训。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺 With 6.52% reporting, Tisza now leads list voting with 84,303 votes compared to Fidesz 77,014. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 TISZA has won 135 seats in the Hungarian parliament, winning them a supermajority. 45% of the votes have been counted so far. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺 随着 6.52% 的选票报告，蒂萨党目前在名单投票中以 84,303 票领先，青年民主联盟为 77,014 票。@wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 蒂萨党已在匈牙利议会赢得 135 个席位，获得了绝对多数。目前已统计 45% 的选票。@wfwitness

text: BREAKING: Viktor Orbán congratulates Péter Magyar on election victory in Hungary.
text_zh: 快讯：维克托·欧尔班祝贺彼得·马扎尔在匈牙利选举中获胜。

text: Apple Maps has removed almost every town in Lebanon from the map while keeping every podunk town in Israel and Syria clearly marked.
text_zh: 苹果地图已从地图上删除了黎巴嫩几乎所有的城镇，同时保留了以色列和叙利亚每一个不起眼的小镇并清晰标注。

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区无人机警报响起。@wfwitness

text: BREAKING: Hungary’s Tisza Party is projected to win a two-thirds majority in parliament based on partial election results, according to the National Election Office.
text_zh: 快讯：据国家选举办公室的初步选举结果显示，匈牙利蒂萨党预计将在议会中赢得三分之二的多数席位。

text: Hungary’s Péter Magyar celebrates as votes are being counted in elections: Thank you Hungary!
text_zh: 匈牙利的彼得·马扎尔在选举计票时庆祝：谢谢你，匈牙利！

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Commander of the Iranian Navy Amir Irani called U.S. President Trump's threats laughable and said that the Navy is monitoring all of the U.S.'s naval movements in the area. "The brave men of the Navy of the Islamic Republic of Iran Army monitor and keep under observation all movements of the invading US army in the region. The threats of the US president after the humiliating defeat of his country's army in the Third Imposed War regarding the naval blockade of Iran are very ridiculous and laughable." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗海军司令阿米尔·伊拉尼称美国总统特朗普的威胁是可笑的，并表示海军正在监视美国在该地区的所有海军动向。“伊朗伊斯兰共和国军队海军的勇士们监视并观察着入侵的美国军队在该地区的所有动向。在美国军队在第三次强加战争中惨败后，美国总统关于对伊朗进行海上封锁的威胁是非常荒谬和可笑的。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇭🇺With nearly 30% of the votes counted, Peter Magyar’s Tisza Party is leading ahead of Orbán. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics" 🇭🇺 After 37% of the votes have been counted, Peter Magyar’s Tisza Party is one seat away from securing a supermajority in parliament. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics: "🇭🇺随着近 30% 的选票统计完成，彼得·马扎尔的蒂萨党领先于欧尔班。🔴 @DDGeopolitics" 🇭🇺 在统计了 37% 的选票后，彼得·马扎尔的蒂萨党距离在议会中获得绝对多数仅差一个席位。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan: Pakistan, the main mediator in US‑Iran talks, is disappointed by the failure but not giving up. A Pakistani government source said efforts continue to arrange another round of talks, while also trying to extend the current two‑week ceasefire beyond its term. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan：作为美伊谈判主要调解人的巴基斯坦对失败感到失望，但并未放弃。巴基斯坦政府消息人士称，努力仍在继续安排新一轮会谈，同时也试图将目前的为期两周的停火协议延长。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam said the south has suffered for years from "occupation, attacks and displacement," paying the price of the state’s absence. “The defence of the south and all of Lebanon will only be achieved through a united and strong state,” he said. He added that efforts continue to stop the war, secure an Israeli withdrawal, release prisoners, rebuild villages and allow displaced residents to return. “Our unity today is not just a sentimental slogan – it is a national necessity.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆表示，南部多年来遭受“占领、袭击和流离失所”之苦，付出了国家缺位的代价。“对南部和整个黎巴嫩的防御只有通过一个团结而强大的国家才能实现，”他说。他补充说，停止战争、确保以色列撤军、释放囚犯、重建村庄并允许流离失所的居民返回的努力仍在继续。“我们今天的团结不仅仅是一个感性的口号，它是国家的必然。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian president Pezeshkian says if the U.S. abandons its totalitarianism, an agreement will be reached. If the American government abandons its totalitarianism and respects the rights of the Iranian nation, ways to reach an agreement will certainly be found. I commend the members of the negotiating team, especially my dear brother Mr. Dr. Qalibaf, and say "God gives you strength." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬表示，如果美国放弃其极权主义，协议就会达成。如果美国政府放弃其极权主义并尊重伊朗民族的权利，达成协议的途径肯定会找到。我赞扬谈判小组成员，特别是我的亲爱的兄弟卡利巴夫博士，并说“上帝赐予你们力量。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah released footage of a strike against an Israeli position in southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党发布了针对黎巴嫩南部以色列阵地进行打击的视频。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱 The advisory committee for senior appointments has approved the candidacy of Major General Roman Gofman as head of the Mossad. Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu signed the appointment letter. Gofman will take office on 2 June 2026 for a five‑year term…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu announced the appointment of Major General Roman Gofman as the next director of the Mossad, following approval by the Grunis Committee. Gofman has served as Netanyahu’s military secretary for the past two years. “He is an outstanding, bold and creative officer, who throughout the war demonstrated out‑of‑the‑box thinking and impressive resourcefulness,” Netanyahu said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱 高级任命咨询委员会已批准罗曼·戈夫曼少将担任摩萨德负责人的候选资格。以色列总理内塔尼亚胡签署了任命书。戈夫曼将于 2026 年 6 月 2 日上任，任期五年……" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列总理内塔尼亚胡宣布任命罗曼·戈夫曼少将为下一任摩萨德局长，此前该任命已获得格鲁尼斯委员会的批准。戈夫曼在过去两年一直担任内塔尼亚胡的军事秘书。“他是一位杰出、大胆且富有创造力的军官，在整个战争期间展现了打破常规的思维和令人印象深刻的足智多谋，”内塔尼亚胡说。@wfwitness

text: 🇭🇺 With nearly 30% of the votes counted, Peter Magyar’s Tisza Party is leading ahead of Orbán. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israel launched an airstrike near the Sheikh Ragheb Harb Hospital in Toul, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness

text: WarMonitor I'll say it again... the Strait of Hormuz was open and free before the war. BREAKING: Trump orders naval blockade to unblock the blockade that only needs unblocking because Trump started the war that caused the blockade. 5D Chess, people. https://twitter.com/VeryBrexitProbs/status/2043349219591770242/photo/1 - Very Brexit Problems tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 我再说一遍……霍尔木兹海峡在战争前是开放和自由的。快讯：特朗普下令进行海上封锁以解除封锁，而这仅仅是因为特朗普发动了导致封锁的战争才需要解除。5D 象棋，伙计们。https://twitter.com/VeryBrexitProbs/status/2043349219591770242/photo/1 - Very Brexit Problems 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran’s ambassador to Pakistan says the Islamabad talks are "not an event but a process." FM Aragachi kind of pushed to back seat https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043397902819639559/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使表示，伊斯兰堡会谈“不是一个事件，而是一个过程。” 外交部长阿拉格奇似乎被推到了次要位置 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043397902819639559/photo/1 - 开源情报 推文

text: Open Source Intel Tisza Party leads early in Hungary's election (14.72% counted), challenger Péter Magyar surging against PM Viktor Orbán. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043398979073777873/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 蒂萨党在匈牙利选举初期领先（已统计 14.72%），挑战者彼得·马扎尔对总理维克托·欧尔班形成冲击。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043398979073777873/photo/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix Ridiculous morons Putin has transferred Satan intercontinental ballistic missiles, with warheads, to Iran, @CPTArmageddon just told me. - Gordon G. Chang tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 荒谬的白痴，普京已经将带有弹头的撒旦洲际弹道导弹转移到了伊朗，@CPTArmageddon 刚刚告诉我的。 - Gordon G. Chang 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺 Early list vote results with 2.86% counted show Fidesz–KDNP leading with 48.18% and 45 mandates, followed by TISZA with 43.38% and 39 mandates. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 With 6.52% reporting, Tisza now leads list voting with 84,303 votes compared to Fidesz 77,014. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺 早期名单投票结果显示，在已统计 2.86% 的选票中，青年民主联盟-基督教民主人民党以 48.18% 和 45 个席位领先，其次是蒂萨党，获得 43.38% 和 39 个席位。@wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 随着 6.52% 的选票报告，蒂萨党目前在名单投票中以 84,303 票领先，青年民主联盟为 77,014 票。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺 Early list vote results with 2.86% counted show Fidesz–KDNP leading with 48.18% and 45 mandates, followed by TISZA with 43.38% and 39 mandates. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 With 14.72% of mandates counted TISZA is leading with 125 total seats, including 89 constituency wins and 36 list seats. Fidesz–KDNP holds 65 seats, with 16 constituency wins and 49 list seats. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺 早期名单投票结果显示，在已统计 2.86% 的选票中，青年民主联盟-基督教民主人民党以 48.18% 和 45 个席位领先，其次是蒂萨党，获得 43.38% 和 39 个席位。@wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 在已统计 14.72% 的席位中，蒂萨党以总计 125 个席位领先，包括 89 个选区胜利和 36 个名单席位。青年民主联盟-基督教民主人民党持有 65 个席位，包括 16 个选区胜利和 49 个名单席位。@wfwitness

text: The UK will not join the US blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.
text_zh: 英国不会加入美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁。

text: 📝 🇸🇦 🇮🇱 "And now, somewhere in Riyadh, the Crown Prince is staring at a charred THAAD radar, a half-empty interceptor magazine, and a $142 billion receipt, and he is doing the math Rubio did on television: 100 missiles a month versus six or seven interceptors. And he is realizing, perhaps for the first time, that the Abraham Accords were not a security guarantee. They were a customer acquisition strategy." https://themiccheck.substack.com/p/the-abraham-accords-a-hilarious-grift
text_zh: 📝 🇸🇦 🇮🇱 “现在，在利雅得的某个地方，王储正盯着一个烧焦的萨德雷达、一个半空的拦截弹弹匣和一张 1420 亿美元的收据，他正在做卢比奥在电视上做的数学题：每月 100 枚导弹对阵六七枚拦截弹。他可能第一次意识到，《亚伯拉罕协议》并不是安全保障。它们是一种客户获取策略。” https://themiccheck.substack.com/p/the-abraham-accords-a-hilarious-grift

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺Vote counting has officially begun for the Hungarian parliamentary elections. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Early list vote results with 2.86% counted show Fidesz–KDNP leading with 48.18% and 45 mandates, followed by TISZA with 43.38% and 39 mandates. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺 匈牙利议会选举的计票工作已正式开始。@wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 早期名单投票结果显示，在已统计 2.86% 的选票中，青年民主联盟-基督教民主人民党以 48.18% 和 45 个席位领先，其次是蒂萨党，获得 43.38% 和 39 个席位。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺 Polls have closed in Hungary’s parliamentary election, with turnout at 77.8% as of 18:30 local time, significantly higher than the 67.8% recorded in the 2022 vote. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Vote counting has officially begun for the Hungarian parliamentary elections. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺 匈牙利议会选举投票站已关闭，截至当地时间 18:30，投票率为 77.8%，明显高于 2022 年投票中记录的 67.8%。@wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 匈牙利议会选举的计票工作已正式开始。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱 The appointment of Roman Gofman, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu’s military secretary, as the next head of the Mossad has been postponed after the Senior Appointments Committee failed to reach unanimous approval. While a majority of committee…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The advisory committee for senior appointments has approved the candidacy of Major General Roman Gofman as head of the Mossad. Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu signed the appointment letter. Gofman will take office on 2 June 2026 for a five‑year term replacing the current Mossad head David Barnea. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡的军事秘书罗曼·戈夫曼被任命为下一任摩萨德负责人，但在高级任命委员会未能达成一致批准后，该任命已被推迟。虽然委员会多数……" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 高级任命咨询委员会已批准罗曼·戈夫曼少将担任摩萨德负责人的候选资格。以色列总理内塔尼亚胡签署了任命书。戈夫曼将于 2026 年 6 月 2 日上任，任期五年，接替现任摩萨德负责人大卫·巴尼亚。@wfwitness
